articles.title: Shepherd and de Kock make the difference as MI New York defend 132 in Pomona
articles.description: Marcus Stoinis put on a strong all-round show, with 3 for 14 and 36 in 31 balls, but couldn't take Seattle Orcas over the line

articles.title: Wijesundara set for debut as injury-hit Sri Lanka struggle to make up XI
articles.description: Lahiru Kumara and Vishwa Fernando are down with injuries, Pathum Nissanka is in the UK for a wrist surgery, and Ramesh Mendis is suffering from a bacterial infection

articles.title: Hope fit but Roach doubtful as WI eye series win
articles.description: Sri Lanka need their batters to fire against the West Indies quicks

articles.title: Nat Sciver-Brunt, Heather Knight put England in final
articles.description: They defended 170 with ease against South Africa and will now face Australia in the final at Lord's on Sunday

articles.title: South Africa bowl and bring in Sune Luus against England
articles.description: England captain Nat Sciver-Brunt returned after recovering from a calf muscle injury, with Dunkley making way

articles.title: Yash Thakur, Saransh Jain make inroads for India A
articles.description: Sri Lanka A captain Sahan Arachchige held fort for the hosts with an unbeaten 83

articles.title: Ashwin: ETPL crucial in making cricket a global sport
articles.description: The former India allrounder believes that a short format like T20 cricket is key to the sport's success in Europe and beyond, including at the LA Olympics in 2028

articles.title: Galle and Colombo to host India for two Tests in August 2026
articles.description: No tour matches have been officially announced

articles.title: Nathan McSweeney agrees 2027 Northants return
articles.description: Australian has been in prolific form in County Championship and T20 Blast

articles.title: WBBL still 'the best' competition despite growth of WPL and Hundred
articles.description: Melbourne Renegades and Melbourne Stars will launch the 2026-27 season in what could be their final edition if privatisation goes through

articles.title: Jonty Rhodes confirms Jai Moondra as Rotterdam Dockers' priority pick in inaugural ETPL draft
articles.description: R Ashwin's Dublin Guardians put player quality above nationality as all six ETPL franchises completed the inaugural draft in Dublin on Thursday

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: 2nd T20I Match Preview
articles.description: The second T20I between India and England is set to be played at Old Trafford, Manchester, on Saturday, July 4.

articles.title: Women's T20 World Cup 2026: ENG W vs SA W Today's Match Highlights: Unmissable video recap, POTM, match analysis, stats and more
articles.description: England will now take on six-time champions Australia for a fourth time in the Women's T20 World Cup final on Sunday at Lord's.

articles.title: Pakistan need multiple leaders in team, not just one captain, says Mike Hesson
articles.description: Hesson also backed the PCB's revamped central contract system, calling it a progressive framework that reflects modern cricket's demands.

articles.title: 'Babar Azam cannot become a power-hitter' - Salman Butt's blunt take on Pakistan star
articles.description: Babar Azam has scored 14000 runs across three formats for Pakistan.

articles.title: 'It was time to throw him into the deep end' - AB de Villiers backs Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's India debut
articles.description: "When will he be unleashed? I thought the Ireland series was the perfect opportunity for him to come in and get a feel for international cricket," said De Villiers.

articles.title: 'He needs to earn the right' - Dinesh Karthik backs Sanju Samson amid growing Vaibhav Sooryavanshi calls
articles.description: Samson has come under scrutiny after registering three low scores on the trot, prompting fans and experts to question his place in India's T20I side.

articles.title: ‘He's the one who implemented…’ - Mithali Raj lauds Jay Shah's contribution to women's cricket, praises initiatives for players' welfare
articles.description: Speaking in an interview, Mithali reflected on how women's cricket has evolved over the years and pointed out that modern-day cricketers now have far greater support than previous generations.

articles.title: 'T20 as a sport is here to stay' - Ravichandran Ashwin backs ETPL as cricket eyes 2028 Olympics
articles.description: Ashwin also expressed doubts about the future of ODI cricket while calling on ETPL franchises to make cricket a global force ahead of 2028.

articles.title: Pathum Nissanka misses LPL 2026 after wrist surgery, India Tests in doubt
articles.description: The LPL 2026 concludes on August 8, just seven days before India's two-Test series in Sri Lanka kicks off on Saturday, August 15, leaving Nissanka a narrow recovery window.
